CONTENT.Club career: Baldé is a youth academy graduate of Paris Saint-Germain (PSG). He signed his first professional contract with the club on 30 June 2020. On 13 July 2021, Baldé joined Ligue 2 club Le Havre on a season-long loan deal. He made his professional debut on 14 August 2021 in a goalless draw against Rodez. By the end of the season, he had made 31 appearances for Le Havre.On 9 August 2022, Baldé signed for Ligue 1 club Troyes on a five-year contract.
CONTENT.Personal life: Baldé was born in France to a Guinean father and a Senegalese mother. He is the cousin of Senagelese footballer Vito Badiane.
CONTENT.External links: Thierno Baldé at the French Football Federation (in French)Thierno Baldé at WorldFootball.netThierno Baldé – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in French

SUMMARY: Thierno Baldé (born 10 June 2002) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defender for  Ligue 2 club Troyes.
